dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} did something terrible while trying to protect the people they care about, {player_name}. They meant well, but the result is devastation.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} angry and lost. {quest_ally} has been sheltering them, but the {quest_focus} left people without what they need. The {enemy_type} have moved into the affected area {location_hint}, making recovery even harder.
dialogueChunks.outro: Someone needs to clean up the mess left by good intentions. Will you help settle the {quest_stakes} and clear the way for things to return to normal?

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_ally} loved someone so much they did something desperate to save them, {player_name}. It worked against the original problem, but the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} now worse than what they tried to cure.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The person is alive but suffering. {target_npc} examined them and says the {quest_focus} used {quest_item} in a way that was never intended. A proper remedy exists, but the ingredients grow only in dangerous territory {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: This can still be corrected, but time is critical. Will you gather what {target_npc} needs {quest_time_pressure} before the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} lost to a well-meaning mistake?

dialogueChunks.intro: Something deeply wrong is happening, {player_name}. {target_npc} has been imprisoning travelers out of {quest_origin}, convinced they threaten the settlement. It started as vigilance and became cruelty.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} discovered the {quest_focus} by accident: people held against their will, some for weeks. {target_npc} genuinely believes they are protecting everyone, but the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} turned a loyal defender into something else. The {enemy_type} raids they fear are real, but the response has gone too far.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_stakes} need to be freed, and {target_npc} needs to be confronted. This requires someone from outside who can see clearly.
